description: Create a subitizing experiment in PsychoPy to test rapid numerosity judgment. The project requires a stimulus generation script at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/subitizing/generate_stimuli.py that produces 8 images (1.png through 8.png) in an 'assets' folder, each featuring N non-overlapping dots. The PsychoPy experiment, saved as /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/subitizing/subitizing_task.psyexp, must utilize a conditions file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/subitizing/conditions.csv to present these stimuli. Each trial must consist of a 500ms fixation cross followed by the stimulus image for exactly 200ms, with a keyboard response (keys 1-8) configured to end the routine.
